# Build Readiness Checklist

## Before Opening ComfyUI

- [ ] Confirm ComfyUI launches successfully.
- [ ] Confirm Python environment is stable.
- [ ] Confirm GPU is detected if running locally.
- [ ] Confirm SDXL checkpoint exists in `models/checkpoints`.
- [ ] Confirm VAE exists in `models/vae`.
- [ ] Confirm the active workflow JSON imports without errors.

## Before Adding Custom Nodes
